delay_1.desc: one-step delayed imitation of the target command

delay_2.desc: two-step delayed imitation of the target command

invert.desc: opposite-direction imitation of the target command

axis_swap.desc: joint-axis swapped imitation, using the shoulder command on the elbow and the elbow command on the shoulder

random.desc: random motor commands sampled independently of the target command

smooth.desc: smoothed imitation that only partially follows the latest target command
